findings.title: Version mismatch plugin.json 0.7.0 vs package.json 0.6.1
findings.description: plugin.json declares version 0.7.0 but package.json declares 0.6.1. This inconsistency can cause confusion during installation and updates.
findings.recommendation: Align version fields across plugin.json and package.json to a single source of truth.

findings.title: package.json scoped name @vooban/code-analysis vs plugin name code-analysis
findings.description: The npm scoped name in package.json does not match the unscoped plugin name in plugin.json.
findings.recommendation: Document the naming convention or align the names.

findings.title: Missing recommended fields: license, homepage, repository
findings.description: plugin.json lacks license, homepage, and repository fields that improve discoverability and trust.
findings.recommendation: Add license, homepage, and repository fields to plugin.json.

findings.title: Undocumented peerDependencies field in plugin.json
findings.description: plugin.json contains a peerDependencies field that is not part of the standard plugin schema.
findings.recommendation: Either document the field purpose or remove it.

findings.title: Non-standard top-level dirs (docs/, templates/, references/)
findings.description: The plugin contains directories not part of the standard plugin layout.
findings.recommendation: No action needed unless plugin registry enforces strict layout.
